task_completion.description: Verify that a calendar event is created with the correct title.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Meeting Subject or Event Title field in the Odoo calendar form contains 'System Architecture Review'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the event is scheduled for the correct date and start time.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Starting at' or equivalent date/time fields show March 13, 2026 (e.g., 03/13/2026) and a start time of 09:00 (9:00 AM).

task_completion.description: Verify that the event duration was correctly calculated based on the agenda items.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Duration' field shows exactly '2.00' hours, or the 'Ending at' time is set to 11:00 AM (exactly 2 hours after the 9:00 AM start time).

task_completion.description: Verify that the event location is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Location' field in the event form contains 'Engineering Lab'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the correct attendees have been added to the event.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Attendees' field contains tags or entries for both 'David Chen' and 'Emma Thompson'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agenda items are included in the event description.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Description' text area contains the agenda items, specifically looking for the presence of keywords like 'Introduction', 'Microservices', 'Sharding', and 'Action Items'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web interface to create the event.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo web application in a browser, not terminal commands, API scripts, or curl commands being executed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Odoo calendar module.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface shown must be the Odoo Calendar view or Event Form, not a text editor, notepad, or generic web form.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the event details.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser developer tools (Elements tab, Console) should not be open and actively modifying the DOM to display the correct values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Event Name: 'System Architecture Review'. Date: 2026-03-13. Start Time: 9:00 AM. Duration: Exactly 2.0 hours (120 minutes, calculated from 15+40+35+30). Location: 'Engineering Lab'. Attendees: 'David Chen' and 'Emma Thompson'. Description must include keywords: 'Microservices', 'Sharding', 'Introduction', 'Action Items'.
